name: MSSP - OS - MS - 20 - M - User Account Created during Non-Business Hour- Weekdays
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4720
when the event(s) occur between 18:00 and 08:00
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 5 minutes
